goal: Implement AGEN task lineage only after live read-only schema inspection, operator approval, backup/rollback evidence, and Codex review.

allowed_now_without_credentials: Read local governed docs and SQL/prompt/workflow files.
Prepare migration design, test matrix, and review checklist.
blocked_until_operator_approval: Read live schema via Supabase APIs or SQL console.
Create, alter, or drop any production table, function, policy, trigger, index, or workflow.
Read, print, move, stage, or commit secret-bearing files.

required_first_actions: Confirm branch head is d5a3678 or later.

implementation_sequence.requirement: Obtain operator-approved read-only Supabase access and capture schema evidence for agent_tasks, agent_architectures, agent_task_dependencies, agent_build_artifacts, agent_verifications, and agent_routing_logs.
Choose exactly one lineage writer owner: Architecture RPC fan-out, PM/Router fan-out, or read projection only.
Draft idempotent SQL only after S1 and S2. Avoid ADD CONSTRAINT IF NOT EXISTS; prove partial-index conflict behavior if used.
Update the owning agent prompt/workflow/test plan and remove Builder/Verification/Router heuristic matching only after the lineage contract is implemented.
Run Codex review against the migration, owner decision, consumer diffs, rollback, RLS, dependency translation, and null-lineage behavior.

success_criteria: Live schema evidence exists and is linked. COMPLETE: audit/AGEN-task-lineage/live-schema-inspection.md
One writer owner is chosen and documented. COMPLETE: Architecture RPC fan-out in docs/policy/AGEN_TASK_LINEAGE_DESIGN_v1.md
Dependency semantics reconcile with agent_task_dependencies. DRAFT IMPROVED: nested commit bd7f440 validates decomposition dependencies and recreates canonical agent_task_dependencies rows.
Rollback and backup plan exist before migration.
Codex review passes before any production write.
rollback_plan: No production changes are authorized by this packet in its current status. Migration draft may proceed locally, but rollback must be defined and reviewed before any live write.
operator_resolution_needed: Provide SQL execution route: Supabase SQL editor, Supabase CLI, psql/database URL, or approved disposable database.
Approve whether the implementation may proceed from local migration draft to live production migration.
Confirm backup destination/evidence requirement before any production migration.

owner_decision.reason: create_architecture_revision already receives the full decomposition and writes the canonical architecture revision transactionally.
owner_decision.dependency_model: agent_task_dependencies remains canonical; jsonb dependencies, if added, are non-canonical projection only.

migration_draft.blocker: No SQL execution route available in this context; REST API keys cannot apply DDL.
